title: Greetings & Introductions
description: Learn basic greetings and how to introduce yourself in Spanish

title: Numbers & Colors
description: Master Spanish numbers from 0-100 and learn color names

title: Family & People
description: Learn vocabulary for family members and how to describe people

title: Food & Drink
description: Discover essential vocabulary for food, drinks, and ordering at a café

title: Daily Routines
description: Talk about everyday activities and your daily schedule

title: Shopping & Money
description: Learn to shop, ask prices, and handle money in Spanish

title: Weather & Seasons
description: Describe the weather and talk about different seasons

title: Transportation & Directions
description: Navigate cities, use transport, and ask for directions

title: Work & Career
description: Discuss jobs, workplaces, and professional life in Spanish

title: Travel & Vacation
description: Plan trips, book accommodations, and handle travel situations

title: Health & Body
description: Discuss health, describe symptoms, and understand medical vocabulary

title: Hobbies & Free Time
description: Talk about interests, hobbies, sports, and leisure activities

title: Current Events & Media
description: Discuss news, media, and current events using complex language

title: Society & Culture
description: Explore social issues, culture, and diverse perspectives in Spanish

title: Environment & Nature
description: Discuss environmental issues, nature, and sustainability

title: Business & Economics
description: Master professional Spanish for business, finance, and negotiation

title: Arts & Literature
description: Engage with Spanish literature, arts, and cultural criticism

title: Abstract Ideas & Debate
description: Express nuanced opinions and engage in sophisticated debate

title: Rhetoric & Persuasion
description: Master advanced rhetoric, persuasive writing, and public speaking in Spanish

title: Idiomatic Mastery
description: Master Spanish idioms, proverbs, and native-level expression
